title: galium anglicum subsp. decipiens
intro: Galium anglicum subsp. decipiens, also known as English bedstraw or lesser bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and insomnia, and acting as a natural diuretic to relieve urinary problems. Galium anglicum subsp. decipiens can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
